nasb.text: You will be fuel for the fire; your blood will be in the midst of the land. You will not be remembered, for I, the Lord, have spoken.’ ”

esv.text: You shall be fuel for the fire. Your blood shall be in the midst of the land. You shall be no more remembered, for I the Lord have spoken.”

cnv.text: 你必當作燃料被火焚燒；你的血要流在你的國中；你必不再被記念，因為這是我耶和華說的。’”

ccb.text: 你们必被当作柴焚烧，你们的血必流在自己的土地上，无人再记得你们。因为这是我耶和华说的。’”
